summary: Completed testing of Wallet, Payment Pages, and Admin Contest Delete features. Fixed 1 bug in backend (entry_fee_paid field missing from /api/payments/my-status response). All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for Wallet Tab, Payment Success/Failed pages, and Admin Contest Delete functionality.

issues: Wallet tab styling uses dark theme colors (text-white) but the dashboard has light theme - minor contrast inconsistency

action_items: Entry fee displays $50 (from active contest), not $30 as mentioned in request - verify if $30 is the intended value
Stripe API key (sk_test_emergent) is a placeholder - needs real Stripe test key for actual payment processing
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: /api/payments/my-status endpoint was missing 'entry_fee_paid' field that frontend expects - added it to response
seed_data_creation: Created test contests via API tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wallet Tab, Payment Pages, and Admin Contest Delete all working. Entry fee from active contest is $50. Wallet API returns balance=0 and empty transactions for new contestants. Withdrawal requires minimum $10 balance.

admin_contest_delete_api.details: DELETE /api/admin/contests/{id} works for draft contests, archives active contests

wallet_tab_ui.details: Shows Available Balance ($0.00), Withdraw section with $10 minimum, Transaction History (empty state)

payment_success_page.details: Shows error state when no session_id, processing state when checking payment

payment_failed_page.details: Shows 'Payment Failed' title, Possible Reasons list, Try Again button, Back to Home button, Contact Support link

payment_failed_entry_type.details: Shows entry fee specific message when type=entry query param

admin_contest_delete_ui.details: Delete buttons (trash icons) visible on each contest row, confirmation dialog appears on click

entry_fee_display.details: Entry fee banner shows $50 (from active contest), $30 is fallback default

bugs_fixed.issue: Missing 'entry_fee_paid' field in /api/payments/my-status response - frontend expects this field
bugs_fixed.fix: Added entry_fee_paid field to response that checks both payment record and contestant.entry_fee_paid

mocked_apis.Email OTP: MOCKED - Logs to console instead of sending actual emails
mocked_apis.Stripe Checkout: Stripe API key is placeholder (sk_test_emergent) - returns error when creating checkout session
